SEARCH

Class UserManager

java.lang.Object
UserManager
public class UserManager extends Object
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Manages all users in the system using HashMaps.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    UserManager()
    Creates an empty user manager.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addUser(User user)
    Adds a user if the username is unique.

    Deletes a user from the system.

    Deletes a user by ID.

    Finds a user by ID.

    Finds a user by first name and last name.

    Finds a user by username.

    Returns all users stored in the system.

    Returns the next available user ID.

    Checks whether a username is unique.

    size()
    Returns the number of users in the system.

    Updates a user's username if the new username is unique.

    • UserManager

      public UserManager()
      Creates an empty user manager.

  • Method Details

    • addUser

      public boolean addUser(User user)
      Adds a user if the username is unique.
      Parameters:
      user - the user to add
      Returns:
      true if the user was added, false otherwise

    • findById

      public User findById(int id)
      Finds a user by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - user ID
      Returns:
      the matching user, or null if not found

    • findByUsername

      public User findByUsername(String username)
      Finds a user by username.
      Parameters:
      username - username to search
      Returns:
      the matching user, or null if not found

    • isUsernameUnique

      public boolean isUsernameUnique(String username)
      Checks whether a username is unique.
      Parameters:
      username - username to check
      Returns:
      true if the username is available

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the number of users in the system.
      Returns:
      total number of users

    • getAllUsers

      public Collection<User> getAllUsers()
      Returns all users stored in the system.
      Returns:
      collection of users

    • deleteUserById

      public boolean deleteUserById(int id)
      Deletes a user by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - user ID
      Returns:
      true if the user was removed, false otherwise

    • findByName

      public User findByName(String firstName, String lastName)
      Finds a user by first name and last name.
      Parameters:
      firstName - user's first name
      lastName - user's last name
      Returns:
      the matching user, or null if not found

    • deleteUser

      public boolean deleteUser(User user)
      Deletes a user from the system.
      Parameters:
      user - user to delete
      Returns:
      true if removed successfully, false otherwise

    • updateUsername

      public boolean updateUsername(User user, String newUsername)
      Updates a user's username if the new username is unique.
      Parameters:
      user - user to update
      newUsername - new username
      Returns:
      true if updated successfully, false otherwise

    • getNextId

      public int getNextId()
      Returns the next available user ID.
      Returns:
      next user ID
